---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Something the plugin should do but doesn't
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like the plugin to do?

(*"Support shipping to Microsoft Store"*, *"add Stripe Connect helper"*, *"detect Lovable changes automatically and push OTA"*, etc.)

## Why?

What pain does this remove? What's the current workaround?

## What would the trigger phrase be?

E.g. if you'd say *"ship to Microsoft Store"*, write that here so we know how a user would invoke it.

## Anything else?

Links to docs, examples from other plugins, screenshots — whatever's useful.
